app.name: Wild Horses Marketplace
app.subtitle: Claude Code plugin marketplace — 5 plugins, their skills, and the CLIs that back them

components.label: User / dev
components.description: Plugin author or consumer driving Claude Code from the terminal.

components.label: Claude Code CLI
components.description: Anthropic's Claude Code runtime — loads plugins, dispatches skills, runs slash commands.

components.label: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
components.description: Marketplace manifest at repo root; Claude Code reads this to enumerate installable plugins.

components.label: refactor plugin
components.description: Plugin providing reasoning-gaps / feedback-blockers analyses and task-list-runner/builder skills.

components.label: linting-hooks plugin
components.description: Plugin that installs PostToolUse hooks for prettier, markdownlint, pyright, jq.

components.label: marketplace plugin
components.description: Plugin providing scaffolding skills for creating new marketplace entries.

components.label: pyright plugin
components.description: Plugin wrapping pyright type-checking with run-and-fix loops and config ratcheting.

components.label: codepath-visualizer plugin
components.description: Plugin that maps a repo into architecture.json + codepaths.json and renders an interactive HTML viz.

components.label: task-list-runner skill
components.description: Drives a structured JSON task list to completion, dispatching each task to a foreground Agent.

components.label: task-list-builder skill
components.description: Builds or rewrites a JSON task list matching the harness task-list schema.

components.label: feedback-blockers command
components.description: Slash command that spawns parallel specialist agents to find encapsulation/testability blockers.

components.label: reasoning-gaps command
components.description: Slash command that finds AI reasoning gaps — untyped signatures, hidden state, etc.

components.label: pyright run-and-fix skill
components.description: Runs pyright and systematically fixes errors using documented fix patterns.

components.label: codepath-mapper skill
components.description: Agent-facing skill that proposes architecture + codepaths against a target repo.

components.label: codepath-visualizer skill
components.description: Opens architecture.html in a browser; supports --select for merged-JSON dispatch back to an agent.

components.label: marketplace/create skill
components.description: Scaffolds a new plugin entry within the marketplace structure.

components.label: task_list_cli.py
components.description: Python CLI that mutates and reads task-list JSON files atomically via stdin or path args.

components.label: codepaths_cli.py
components.description: Python CLI that mutates and reads architecture.json + codepaths.json; also renders HTML and runs select mode.

components.label: GitHub
components.description: Remote git host — source of /plugin install URLs and PR/issue surface.

components.label: Web browser
components.description: Local default browser; renders architecture.html for the visualizer's interactive UI.
